subject: Fw:
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, August 28, 2007 5:17:54 AM
Subject: 


Good morning Mr. Epstein!
I have to start by saying that I certainly miss you already!  I hope you are doing well, you are remaining strong and positive and that things are going better for you once again.  You must know how I truly mean that.  
Again, I have to be honest by cofused I was and completely surprised when I turned my phone on and had the system taken over and all contents wiped out.   I understand why you had Ellmax removed  however I think you misunderstood my concern, it wasn't to quit my job suddenly as you above all other know how important a month more of pay is to me, my rent and my upcoming venture.  I brought it to you and GM's attention to be upfront and honest how I felt and wanted to sit and discuss it with you.  But seeing how you deleted my ellmax it was a clear sign you fired me.  It was disappointing and terribly frustrated that without any knowledge at all my phone entirely wiped out.  ALL of my contacts, iincluding those I had built for my upcoming venture, drafts I had stored in email gone, text messages carrying important messages or numbers...all gone and NO way to recover them.  Imagine your database gone...and I did't even have any contacts of GM's on my phone
 to begin with, only email yet wiped out everything.  Notice that that was being done would have cleared up any position confusion and saved me a lot of important info.  So, I'd call the island but I don't have the number now nor your private number.  
The last thing I wanted to do is end things with you and GM, hell I adore the both of you and would tell the world what an amazing human you are with this enormous heart and all you've done for me and with all the craziness I'm preparing to embark on your advice and guidance was of such vital importance to me.  Nevertheless, I will keep you posted oon my venture and will make you proud with all that I hope to accomplish.   
If you need anything please let me know what I can do to help out.  
Best,
cd

body_html:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, August 28, 2007 5:17:54 AM
Subject:

Good morning Mr. Epstein!

I have to start by saying that I certainly miss you already!  I hope you are doing well, you are remaining strong and positive and that things are going better for you once again.  You must know how I truly mean that. 

Again, I have to be honest by cofused I was and completely surprised when I turned my phone on and had the system taken over and all contents wiped out.   I understand why you had Ellmax removed  however I think you misunderstood my concern, it wasn't to quit my job suddenly as you above all other know how important a month more of pay is to me, my rent and my upcoming venture.  I brought it to you and GM's attention to be upfront and honest how I felt and wanted to sit and discuss it with you.  But seeing how you deleted my ellmax it was a clear sign you fired me.  It was disappointing and terribly frustrated that without any knowledge at all my phone entirely wiped out.  ALL of my contacts, iincluding those I had built for my upcoming venture, drafts I had stored in email gone, text messages carrying important messages or numbers...all gone and NO way to recover them.  Imagine your database gone...and I did't even have any contacts of GM's on my phone to begin with, only email yet wiped out everything.  Notice that that was being done would have cleared up any position confusion and saved me a lot of important info.  So, I'd call the island but I don't have the number now nor your private number. 

The last thing I wanted to do is end things with you and GM, hell I adore the both of you and would tell the world what an amazing human you are with this enormous heart and all you've done for me and with all the craziness I'm preparing to embark on your advice and guidance was of such vital importance to me.  Nevertheless, I will keep you posted oon my venture and will make you proud with all that I hope to accomplish.  

If you need anything please let me know what I can do to help out. 

Best,

cd
